plugins.name: scaffold-repository
plugins.description: Scaffold or realign a repo to the Patina Project baseline. Install: npm_config_ignore_scripts=true npx skills@1.5.6 add patinaproject/skills@scaffold-repository --agent codex -y

plugins.name: superteam
plugins.description: Issue-driven orchestration: design → plan → execute → review. Install: npm_config_ignore_scripts=true npx skills@1.5.6 add patinaproject/skills@superteam --agent codex -y

plugins.name: using-github
plugins.description: GitHub workflow skill: issues, branches, PRs, and changelogs. Install: npm_config_ignore_scripts=true npx skills@1.5.6 add patinaproject/skills@using-github --agent codex -y
